DP.081.0001:
When a Pokémon faints, it just means
it doesn’t have the power to battle.\f
But it can still use hidden moves
outside of battle!
DP.081.0002:
Team Galactic took my Pokémon away.
They took other people’s, too.\f
Something should be done, but Team
Galactic creeps everyone out...\f
What are they doing to my Pokémon?
DP.081.0003:
I got my Pokémon back!\f
I’m so happy, I feel like riding my Bike
down Cycling Road together with it!
DP.081.0005:
Hi, you cute little Trainer!
What kinds of Pokémon are with you?\f
This Pokétch app will show how
close your Pokémon feel to you.\f
DP.081.0006:
If you spend enough time with them,
all Pokémon will open up to you.
DP.081.0007:
Hi, you cute little Trainer!
What kinds of Pokémon are with you?\f
Oh, your [0100,0000]...\f
DP.081.0008:
It seems to like you.
It must be happy being with you.
DP.081.0009:
It’s becoming comfortable around
you, I think.
DP.081.0010:
Hmm...
It needs to get used to you more.
